name: Single research task arrives unprompted
tasks_sent: Find me the top 3 Italian restaurants in Pittsburgh with their hours and ratings
responses: Got you, Abdul. Digging up the best spots in Pittsburgh now.
Btw, what do you do for a living? Want to make sure I'm matching your vibe.
reason: Asmi only provided an acknowledgement of the task and a follow-up question, failing to provide the requested restaurant information.
